verses.text: Jehoshaphat succeeds Asa and strengthens himself against Israel, garrisoning Judah's cities. He prepares wisely for his reign. A ruler may trust God and still take prudent measures; faith and diligence are not enemies but partners.

Jehoshaphat succeeds Asa and strengthens himself against Israel, garrisoning Judah's cities. He prepares wisely for his reign. A ruler may trust God and still take prudent measures; faith and diligence are not enemies but partners.

The LORD is with Jehoshaphat because he walks in David's early ways, seeks God rather than Baal, and his heart is 'lifted up in the ways of the LORD,' so he removes the high places. A heart set high on God's ways is the secret of a blessed life and a cleansed land.

The LORD is with Jehoshaphat because he walks in David's early ways, seeks God rather than Baal, and his heart is 'lifted up in the ways of the LORD,' so he removes the high places. A heart set high on God's ways is the secret of a blessed life and a cleansed land.

The LORD is with Jehoshaphat because he walks in David's early ways, seeks God rather than Baal, and his heart is 'lifted up in the ways of the LORD,' so he removes the high places. A heart set high on God's ways is the secret of a blessed life and a cleansed land.

The LORD is with Jehoshaphat because he walks in David's early ways, seeks God rather than Baal, and his heart is 'lifted up in the ways of the LORD,' so he removes the high places. A heart set high on God's ways is the secret of a blessed life and a cleansed land.

Jehoshaphat sends princes and Levites through Judah to teach the law from the book of the LORD. He spreads the Scriptures among the people. A king's best gift to his nation is the knowledge of God's word, taught plainly in every town.

Jehoshaphat sends princes and Levites through Judah to teach the law from the book of the LORD. He spreads the Scriptures among the people. A king's best gift to his nation is the knowledge of God's word, taught plainly in every town.

Jehoshaphat sends princes and Levites through Judah to teach the law from the book of the LORD. He spreads the Scriptures among the people. A king's best gift to his nation is the knowledge of God's word, taught plainly in every town.

The fear of the LORD falls on the surrounding kingdoms, and they bring tribute rather than make war. God guards the king who honours Him. When a people walk with God, He can make even their enemies keep the peace.

The fear of the LORD falls on the surrounding kingdoms, and they bring tribute rather than make war. God guards the king who honours Him. When a people walk with God, He can make even their enemies keep the peace.

Jehoshaphat grows ever greater, building fortresses and store cities throughout Judah. His obedience is matched by increase. God often crowns faithful devotion with strength and provision, that His servant may serve Him the better.

Jehoshaphat grows ever greater, building fortresses and store cities throughout Judah. His obedience is matched by increase. God often crowns faithful devotion with strength and provision, that His servant may serve Him the better.

His mighty men are mustered by their families, captains over vast numbers of valiant warriors. The kingdom is rich in willing soldiers. God supplies His servants with the help they need, often through the loyal hands of many.

His mighty men are mustered by their families, captains over vast numbers of valiant warriors. The kingdom is rich in willing soldiers. God supplies His servants with the help they need, often through the loyal hands of many.

His mighty men are mustered by their families, captains over vast numbers of valiant warriors. The kingdom is rich in willing soldiers. God supplies His servants with the help they need, often through the loyal hands of many.

More captains and armed thousands are numbered, all waiting on the king at Jerusalem besides his garrison forces. The realm is strong and ready. Blessing rightly used does not breed idleness but readiness to stand for what is good.
